events.appearance_notes: Observed event; After the yard gate opened, a black car drove in.
events.event_text: From 9.4s to 25.5s, after the yard gate opened, a black car drove in.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The white gate of the yard slowly closed, and a motorcycle drove to the gate of the yard, with two people sitting on the motorcycle.
events.event_text: From 26.9s to 32.1s, the white gate of the yard slowly closed, and a motorcycle drove to the gate of the yard, with two people sitting on the motorcycle.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A woman got out of a black car in the courtyard, and a man in black on a motorcycle ran into the courtyard.
events.event_text: From 32.1s to 37.1s, a woman got out of a black car in the courtyard, and a man in black on a motorcycle ran into the courtyard.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in black and the woman in the courtyard were fighting for the bag, and both sides were pulling.
events.event_text: From 37.1s to 42.0s, the man in black and the woman in the courtyard were fighting for the bag, and both sides were pulling.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The woman jumped up and attacked the man, then pushed the man into the grass.
events.event_text: From 42.0s to 44.2s, the woman jumped up and attacked the man, then pushed the man into the grass.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The woman jumped into the grass and beat the man who fell to the ground.
events.event_text: From 44.2s to 50.8s, the woman jumped into the grass and beat the man who fell to the ground.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A man in black ran into the yard, holding a knife in his hand, and then the woman in black stood up and stepped aside.
events.event_text: From 49.1s to 51.8s, a man in black ran into the yard, holding a knife in his hand, and then the woman in black stood up and stepped aside.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man with the knife dragged the beaten man out of the yard, and the woman in black ran out of the screen.
events.event_text: From 51.8s to 56.6s, the man with the knife dragged the beaten man out of the yard, and the woman in black ran out of the screen.
